reference_electrode.Description: Name of the reference electrode for this channel.

grid_name.Description: Manufacturer model name of the electrode grid.

interelectrode_distance.Description: Distance between adjacent electrodes in the grid.

target_muscle.Description: Name of the muscle targeted by this electrode.

signal_electrode.Description: Name of the signal electrode for this channel.

ch_description.Description: Description of what is measured on this channel.
